name: PT MNC Land Tbk
summary: PT MNC Land Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, rents office spaces and provides securities and other property services in Indonesia. The company also develops and operates real estate properties, such as hotels and resorts, golf courses, conventions, and theme parks. In addition, it offers property services, including building security, housekeeping, technical, and property management services; and manpower supply services. Further, PT MNC Land Tbk engages in the food and beverage business, and investment activities. The company was formerly known as PT Global Land Development Tbk and changed its name to PT MNC Land Tbk in 2012. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT MNC Land Tbk is a subsidiary of PT MNC Investama Tbk.
